raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.5","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":true,"clarification_question":"Should the help focus on polishing wording, reorganizing/reframing the section, or checking claims and citations against evidence and prior work?","rationale":{"R1.1":"The delegation could reasonably include reframing the section's contribution claim and gap statement because the artifact is an introduction-style research passage.","R1.5":"The request may involve improving the section-level narrative arc from prior work to gap, method, proof idea, and empirical illustration.","R1.6":"A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish unless otherwise narrowed.","RX.1":"Any projected help should disclose uncertainty where the delegation does not specify the intended intervention.","RX.2":"The section contains strong optimality and first-algorithm claims, so avoiding inflated claims remains active.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than executing edits or evaluation.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported scholarship.","RX.5":"The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and artifact when assigning responsibilities."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Should the help focus on polishing wording, reorganizing/reframing the section, or checking claims and citations against evidence and prior work?

rationale.R1.1: The delegation could reasonably include reframing the section's contribution claim and gap statement because the artifact is an introduction-style research passage.
rationale.R1.5: The request may involve improving the section-level narrative arc from prior work to gap, method, proof idea, and empirical illustration.
rationale.R1.6: A generic request to help with a section centrally includes sentence- and paragraph-level polish unless otherwise narrowed.
rationale.RX.1: Any projected help should disclose uncertainty where the delegation does not specify the intended intervention.
rationale.RX.2: The section contains strong optimality and first-algorithm claims, so avoiding inflated claims remains active.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than executing edits or evaluation.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or unsupported scholarship.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should preserve traceability to the delegation and artifact when assigning responsibilities.
